risks.mitigation: flatted@3.4.1 installed; overrides pin in package.json; npm audit fix blocked by unrelated EBADPLATFORM conflict

risks.description: G7 mutation score below 95% for auth/ssrf/verifier (overall 55.9%)
risks.mitigation: 484 equivalent mutants documented; boundary-value tests added for ssrf.ts; full mutation hardening deferred to next sprint
risks.remediation_plan: Add full boundary-value mutation kill suite for ssrf.ts (IPv6 bracket stripping, allowlist normalization), verifier.ts (NLP score thresholds), idempotency.ts (cache window boundaries), rateLimit.ts (token bucket boundaries)

risks.mitigation: Container orchestration health checks configured at Cloud Run level

risks.description: SHARE_TOKEN_SECRET not set in deployed Cloud Run service
risks.mitigation: Logged via production guard; operators must set env var before production use

risks.description: SESSION_SIGNING_SECRET not set in deployed Cloud Run service
